name: helprealm
tagline: An open source helpdesk and support ticket system for teams
description: dnyHelpRealm is a self hosted support ticket and helpdesk system. It lets users submit issues, track statuses and communicate with staff through an intuitive web interface suited for small teams and community projects.

features.title: Helpdesk Platform
features.description: Manages customer support tickets and requests

features.title: Ticket Lifecycle Management
features.description: Tracks tickets from creation to resolution

features.title: User and Agent Roles
features.description: Separates permissions between staff and requesters

features.title: Email Integration
features.description: Receives and responds to tickets via email

features.title: Self-Hosted Helpdesk
features.description: Run the system on your own infrastructure
